positive: A stylized, intricate mandala design featuring interconnected woodland elements and celestial motifs. Incorporate stylized antlers, deep forest ferns, glowing crescent moons, and geometric starry constellations. The overall composition should be a detailed circular medallion, suitable for printing on fabric. Use a color palette of deep emerald green, burnt orange, rich indigo blue, and creamy ivory. The style should be neo-tribal gothic etching mixed with Art Nouveau botanical illustration. High contrast, clean lines, symmetrical radial composition, strong central focal point, graphic design art, vector illustration quality, minimalist silhouette style. Center composition, isolated on a clean white background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, dirty background, photographic, photorealistic, grainy
